tool_args.label: NYCT YTD Total Revenues
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenues of $2.914 billion were $112 million (3.7%) lower than the Mid-year Forecast.

tool_args.label: NYCT YTD Total Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership was 874.8 million, which exceeded the Forecast by 3.4 million (0.4%).

tool_args.label: NYCT YTD Total Expenses
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses of $8.117 billion including non-cash liabilities were $208 million (2.5%), lower than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: NYCT Headcount August 2022
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of August, total headcount was 45,857, which was 2,361 lower than the Forecast of 48,218.

tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date August Cost per Passenger was $6.88, which is lower than the Forecast by $0.10 per passenger

tool_args.label: SIR YTD Total Revenues
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenues of $4.362 million were $3.265 million (42.8%) lower than the Mid-Year Forecast.

tool_args.label: SIR YTD Total Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership was 1.277 million, 20.5% lower than Forecast.

tool_args.label: SIR YTD Total Expenses
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses of $53.563 million including non-cash liabilities were $5.436 million (9.2%), lower than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: SIR Headcount August 2022
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of August, total headcount was 346, which was 51 lower than the Forecast of 397.

tool_args.label: SIR YTD Farebox Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: SIR farebox revenue totaled $2.032 million, which was $0.544 million (21.1%) below the Forecast.

tool_args.label: SIR YTD Farebox Operating Ratio
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date August Farebox Operating Ratio was 5.8%, which is below the Forecast by 1.3 percentage points

tool_args.label: SIR YTD Cost per Passenger
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date August Cost per Passenger was $34.16, which is higher than the Forecast by $4.91 per passenger

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Total Revenues
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenues of $121.2 million were $7.6 million (6.7%) above than the Mid-Year forecast

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Bus August ridership was 53.9 million, 6.3% greater than forecast.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Total Expenses
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses of $590.5 million including non-cash liabilities were $106.4 million (15.3%) lower than the forecast.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Headcount August 2022
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of August, total headcount was 3,751, which was 260 lower than the forecast of 4,010.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Farebox Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: MTABC Farebox Revenue totaled $105.7 million, which was $8.7 million (8.9%) above the forecast

tool_args.label: MTA Bus August 2022 Farebox Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: MTABC Farebox Revenue totaled $16.3 million in August 2022, which was $3.5 million (27.7%) above forecast

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio
tool_args.raw_text: The Year-to-date August Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio was 19.1%, which is above the forecast due to higher farebox revenue and lower operating expenses.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Adjusted Cost per Passenger
tool_args.raw_text: The Year-to-date August Adjusted Cost per Passenger was $10.28, which is lower than the forecast due to higher ridership and lower operating expenses.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus YTD Revenue per Passenger
tool_args.raw_text: The Year-to-date August Revenue per passenger was $1.96, which was above the forecast due to higher farebox revenue and ridership.

tool_args.label: NYCT Largest Vacancies in Subways Maintenance
tool_args.raw_text: The largest number of vacancies were in Subways Maintenance (1,168 positions) and Subways Operations (523 positions). There were significant vacancies in Construction and Development (278 positions), and also other Administrative functions (203 positions).

payload.claim_text: The largest number of vacancies were in Subways Maintenance (1,168 positions) and Subways Operations (523 positions). There were significant vacancies in Construction and Development (278 positions), and also other Administrative functions (203 positions).

tool_args.label: Results based on preliminary close
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

tool_args.label: NYCT YTD Health & Welfare Favorable
tool_args.raw_text: Health & Welfare and OPEB Current Payments were $105.7 million (9.4%) favorable due primarily to claims underruns and favorable prescription rebate credits.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Farebox Favorable Due to Higher Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox Revenues were $8.7 million (8.9%) favorable to the forecast due to higher ridership and higher average fare. Ridership through August was 53.9 million. This was 6.3% higher than forecast.
